## Pull Request Policy

By opening this pull request, you agree to the following repository policies:

1. No direct pushes to the default branch (`master`).
2. Every pull request must be approved by @Reprezent before merge.
3. **The build must pass before merging** (enforced by GitHub Actions).

## Checklist

- [ ] I did not push directly to `master`.
- [ ] The build passes (`Build` workflow shows ✓).
- [ ] I requested review from @Reprezent.
- [ ] I will not merge until @Reprezent has approved.
